raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation urging immediate self-understanding and moral-spiritual preparation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a single Lord/Governor exists who originates all things including the addressee",
    "human existence is a temporary, non-repeating allotment of time",
    "failure to calm inner 'distempers' within that allotment results in permanent loss",
    "the world possesses an intelligible 'true nature' that can be grasped",
    "the addressee currently lacks this understanding and must acquire it without delay"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; metaphors of flow and appointed time support a unified teleological and time-limited view of life",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the addressee accepts a theistic or pantheistic metaphysics, values inner calm as the proper use of time, and can act on the advice before death",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no such Governor or appointed limit exists, the recommended self-understanding is illusory, or acting on it produces net harm rather than calm"
}
